allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "JAVA_HOME=$env:JAVA_HOME"; Write-Output "ANDROID_HOME=$env:ANDROID_HOME"; Write-Output "ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=$env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT"; Write-Output "---java---"; try { java -version 2>&1 } catch { "no java" }; Write-Output "---gradle---"; try { \(Get-Command gradle -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch { "no gradle on PATH \(will use wrapper\)" }; Write-Output "---SDK platforms---"; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platforms" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name; Write-Output "---build-tools---"; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\build-tools" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name)

PowerShell(Write-Output "LOCALAPPDATA=$env:LOCALAPPDATA"; Write-Output "SDK exists: $\(Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platforms\\android-35"\)"; Write-Output "JBR exists: $\(Test-Path 'C:\\Program Files\\Android\\Android Studio\\jbr\\bin\\java.exe'\)")
Bash(rm -rf feature/prayer feature/qibla feature/alarm feature/hifz feature/recitation data)
